name: Baikal
description: A lightweight calendar and contacts server
compose:
name: slashnode-baikal
services:
  web:
    image: ghcr.io/aalmenar/baikal:0.11.1-nginx
    container_name: baikal
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    volumes:
      - web_data-config:/var/www/baikal/config
      - web_data-Specific:/var/www/baikal/Specific
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:8890:80
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  web_data-config:
    name: slashnode-baikal_web_data-config
  web_data-Specific:
    name: slashnode-baikal_web_data-Specific
